zh.Heigham Green, Gazeley, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可加澤利
zh.of Heigham Green, Gazeley, Suffolk, Engl: 英國英格蘭素福爾可加澤利
zh.of Higham, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可希加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Higham III於1398年5月23日出生在英國素福爾可希加姆時，他的父親Thomas Higham II30歲，母親Alice Hune26歲。他於1418年與Alice Boyes結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年3月21日在英國素福爾可加澤利享年81歲。

zh-hans.of Higham, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可希加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Higham III于1398年5月23日出生在英国素福爾可希加姆时，他的父亲Thomas Higham II30岁，母亲Alice Hune26岁。他于1418年与Alice Boyes结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年3月21日在英国素福爾可加澤利享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Higham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Higham (Lancashire, Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire, Northamptonshire, Bedfordshire, Warwickshire, Essex, and Kent) or from Heigham in Norfolk. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + hām ‘village, homestead’, though the Norfolk placename may come from Old English hecg ‘hedge’ or hecc ‘hatch, gate’ + hām.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Higham III was born on 23 May 1398, in Higham, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Higham II, was 30 and his mother, Alice Hune, was 26. He married Alice Boyes in 1418. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 March 1480, in Gazeley, Suffolk, England, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Higham III est né le 23 mai 1398, à Higham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Higham II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Hune, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Boyes en 1418. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1480, à Gazeley, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Higham III am 23. Mai 1398 in Higham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Higham II 30 und seine Mutter Alice Hune 26. Er hat 1418 Alice Boyes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. März 1480 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Gazeley, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Higham III è nato il il 23 maggio 1398 nel Higham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Higham II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice Hune, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice Boyes nel 1418. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 marzo 1480, nel Gazeley, Suffolk, England, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Higham IIIが1398年5月23日にイギリススフォルクヒガムで生まれた時，父Thomas Higham IIは30歳，母Alice Huneは26歳であった。1418年にAlice Boyesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年3月21日にイギリススフォルクガズエリーで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Higham III(이)가 1398년 5월 23일 영국 수폴크 히아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Higham II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hune(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1418년 Alice Boyes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 3월 21일 영국 수폴크 게이즈리에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.23 May 1398–21 March 1480: 23 de maio de 1398–21 de março de 1480
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Higham III nasceu em 23 de maio de 1398, em Higham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Higham II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Hune, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Boyes em 1418. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de março de 1480, em Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Higham III родился 23 мая 1398 г. в местности хаиам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Higham II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Hune, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Boyes в 1418 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 марта 1480 г. в местности газели, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 81 год.

es.23 May 1398–21 March 1480: 23 de mayo de 1398–21 de marzo de 1480
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Higham III nació el 23 de mayo de 1398, en Higham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Higham II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Hune, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice Boyes en 1418. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1480, en Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años.
